theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

narrative.summary: Jupiter: 정량 종합 58점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 73 / 중기 66 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 정상
overheat.guidance: 진입 OK. 종합 점수가 좋다면 매수 검토.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 일봉 200MA, Fib 0.618. 현재가 대비 +4.1% 위치. T1 $0.2011 (R:R 1.1), T2 $0.2163 (R:R 2.1)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $0.1864 아래 손절가 $0.1724 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Kalshi Aims to Expand Perpetual Futures After $5.5 Billion Debut
top_news.summary: Kalshi Inc. is looking to expand its new perpetual futures business beyond digital assets after the never-expiring derivatives racked up more than $5.5 billion of trading volume in their first two weeks on the prediction-market platform.

top_news.title: Brookfield-Backed Data Center Firm Csquare Files for US IPO
top_news.summary: Csquare Inc., a data center company backed by Brookfield Corp., filed publicly for a US initial public offering, joining a rush of debuts linked to artificial intelligence infrastructure.

top_news.title: Damodaran: AI Shaky, High-Potential Business for SpaceX
top_news.summary: On the third day of trading, SpaceX's market capitalization surged to approximately $2.7 trillion, positioning the company to surpass Amazon in market value. Joining the discussion, Aswath Damodaran, Professor of Finance at NYU Stern School of Business, provided his valuation perspective. He explained that his recent analysis estimated SpaceX's enterprise value at around $1.2 trillion and equity value near $1.3 trillion, roughly half of the current market cap. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Ka

top_news.title: Emerging FX Index Edges Up on Peace Deal Ahead of Fed Meeting
top_news.summary: An index for emerging-market currencies edged higher before the end-of-day adjustment Monday as traders weighed the interim peace deal between the US and Iran against uncertainty from the Federal Reserve’s upcoming policy meeting.

top_news.title: Oil Falls to Three-Month Low as US-Iran Deal Set to Add Supply
top_news.summary: Oil logged its longest run of declines this year as the US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz boosted expectations for a revival in supply, with leading Wall Street banks reducing their price forecasts and key market gauges tumbling.

top_news.title: Exxon to Supply LNG to Help South Africa Reduce Reliance on Coal
top_news.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. struck a preliminary deal to bring liquefied natural gas to South Africa, which will use the fuel to bolster its coal-reliant power grid, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Private-Credit Defaults Match 2023 High in a KBRA Index
top_news.summary: The default rate among private-credit borrowers has reached the highest in the roughly three-year history of an index from Kroll Bond Rating Agency LLC, adding to signs of stress in the $1.8 trillion industry.

top_news.title: Biofuels Are Key to Avoiding Sharp Farmland Drop, S&P Says
top_news.summary: Expanding biofuel demand is a “powerful catalyst” to restore profitability to American farms, according to a new study, as harvests balloon and lawmakers consider broadening the market for corn-based ethanol.

top_news.title: T-Shirt Maker Gildan Plunges on Short Seller’s Revenue Claim
top_news.summary: Shares of Gildan Activewear Inc. tumbled the most in more than six years after short seller Jehoshaphat Research published a negative report accusing the company of inflating revenue.

top_news.title: Tech Stocks Halt S&P 500 Rally | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)
